GOOD_MORNING.title: Good Morning, {name}!
GOOD_MORNING.body: A new day to learn. Don't forget your scheduled study time today.

CLASS_REMINDER.title: {subject} class in 15 mins
CLASS_REMINDER.body: Your {subject} class for {batch} starts at {time}. Be ready!

CLASS_STARTED.title: {subject} Class Started
CLASS_STARTED.body: The {subject} class has started. Join now!

MISSED_CLASS.title: You missed {subject}
MISSED_CLASS.body: You missed the {subject} class. You can watch the recording later.

TEST_REMINDER.title: Test Tomorrow!
TEST_REMINDER.body: You have a test scheduled for tomorrow at {time}. Keep revising!

FEE_DUE.title: Fee Reminder
FEE_DUE.body: Your fee of {amount} is due on {date}.

RESULT_PUBLISHED.title: Result Published
RESULT_PUBLISHED.body: Your result is out! You scored {score} with rank {rank}.

GOOD_NIGHT.title: Good Night, {name}!
GOOD_NIGHT.body: Rest well to stay energized for tomorrow's classes.

GOOD_AFTERNOON.title: Good Afternoon, {name}! ☀️
GOOD_AFTERNOON.body: Hope your morning was productive! Stay focused for the rest of the day.

VIDEO_INCOMPLETE.title: Continue watching, {name}! 🎬
VIDEO_INCOMPLETE.body: You left your {subject} lecture at {percentage}%. Finish it today!

MISSED_TEST.title: You missed a test, {name} 😟
MISSED_TEST.body: You missed the {testName} test. Check if a retake is available!

STUDY_PLAN_PENDING.title: Study plan awaits, {name}! 📚
STUDY_PLAN_PENDING.body: You have {taskCount} tasks pending for today. Let's get started!

STUDY_PLAN_COMPLETED.title: All done for today, {name}! 🎉
STUDY_PLAN_COMPLETED.body: You completed all your study tasks today. Amazing work!

NO_STUDY_PLAN.title: No study plan found, {name} 🗓️
NO_STUDY_PLAN.body: You don't have an active study plan. Generate your AI study plan today!

TEST_INSIGHT.title: Test insight for you, {name} 🧠
TEST_INSIGHT.body: Your last test had {errorCount} conceptual errors. Focus on revising those chapters!

GOOD_MORNING_WITH_PLAN.title: Good morning, {name}! ☀️
GOOD_MORNING_WITH_PLAN.body: You have {taskCount} study tasks and {classCount} live classes today. Make it count!
